chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm WAVE, Retro Wave's virtual assistant 👋 How can I help you?
chatbot.reset: Conversation restarted! How can I help you? 👋
chatbot.fb_how_to_buy: Buying is easy! 🛒 Choose a jersey, select your size (S, M, L or XL) and click "Add to Cart". Then go to your cart and click "Checkout". Fill in your details and you're done!
chatbot.fb_delivery: Delivery takes 7 to 15 business days after payment confirmation 📦 The timeframe may vary by region. You'll receive an email with shipping details.
chatbot.fb_sizes: We offer 4 sizes: S, M, L and XL 📏 Measurements follow standard sizing. If you're between two sizes, we recommend going with the larger one for comfort.
chatbot.fb_returns: You can request an exchange or return within 7 days of receipt 🔄 The product must be unused with the original tag. Contact us at retroswaves@gmail.com to start the process.
chatbot.fb_payment: We accept major payment methods: credit card (up to 3 interest-free installments), PIX and bank slip 💳 Payment is processed through secure gateways.
chatbot.fb_coupon: To use a coupon, add products to your cart and on the checkout screen enter the code in the "Discount Coupon" field and click "Apply" 🎟️ The discount will be automatically applied to the total.
chatbot.fb_tracking: To track your order, go to "My Orders" 📋 Click the package icon at the top of the site. There you'll see the updated status of each purchase.
chatbot.fb_newsletter: Our newsletter brings exclusive deals, new arrivals and discount coupons! 📧 To subscribe, scroll to the bottom of the site and enter your best email in the Newsletter field.
chatbot.fb_care: To preserve your retro jersey: hand wash or machine wash on delicate cycle with cold water 🧺 Use mild soap, no bleach, no dryer. Air dry in the shade and iron on low heat inside out.
chatbot.fb_contact: To reach our team, send an email to retroswaves@gmail.com 📧 We respond within 24 business hours. You can also ask me your questions here!
chatbot.fb_shipping: We offer free shipping on orders over R$ 299.90! 🚚 For lower amounts, shipping is calculated by ZIP code at checkout.
chatbot.fb_favorites: To save a jersey to your favorites, click the heart icon ❤️ on the jersey you like.
chatbot.fb_reviews: You can rate products you've purchased! ⭐ Open the product, click "Reviews" and leave a rating from 1 to 5 stars with an optional comment.
chatbot.fb_install: You can install the Retro Wave app on your phone! 📱 In Chrome, tap the 3 dots and select "Install app" or "Add to home screen".
chatbot.fb_material: All our jerseys are made of 100% high-quality polyester 👕 They are brand new retro replicas with premium finishing and official labels.
chatbot.fb_who: I'm WAVE, Retro Wave's virtual assistant! 👋 I'm here to help you with questions about products, purchases, deliveries and more.
chatbot.fb_fallback: I'm currently having trouble accessing my advanced knowledge base. But I can help you with the quick questions below! For more specific queries, contact us at retroswaves@gmail.com 📧

policy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
policy.s1_intro: Retro Wave collects only the data strictly necessary to process your purchases and ensure a quality experience:
policy.s1_name: Identification data: full name and email address, provided at the time of purchase.
policy.s1_address: Delivery address: for shipping purchased products.
policy.s1_nav: Browsing data: anonymous access information (anonymized IP) for internal metrics, without individual tracking.
policy.s2_intro: Your personal data is used exclusively to:
policy.s2_confirm: Send confirmations and order status updates;
policy.s2_track: Allow order tracking in the "My Orders" area;
policy.s2_legal: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations.
policy.s2_noshare: We do not sell, share or transfer your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.
policy.s3_intro: The processing of personal data by Retro Wave is based on the following legal bases:
policy.s3_consent: Consent: through explicit acceptance at the time of purchase.
policy.s3_contract: Contract execution: to enable the delivery of purchased products.
policy.s3_interest: Legitimate interest: for aggregated and anonymized internal metrics.
policy.s4_bcrypt: Administrative passwords are encrypted with bcrypt (12 salt rounds).
policy.s4_db: Data is stored in a database with restricted access.
policy.s4_payment: We do not store payment data — transactions are processed by secure third-party gateways.
policy.s4_measures: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss or destruction.
policy.s5_intro: You have the right to, at any time:
policy.s5_confirm: Confirm the existence of processing of your data;
policy.s5_access: Access, correct or update your personal data;
policy.s5_delete: Request anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary data;
policy.s5_contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at retroswaves@gmail.com.
policy.s6_intro: We use the browser's localStorage exclusively to:
policy.s6_session: Keep the client session active (invisible login data);
policy.s6_cart: Preserve the cart contents during browsing.
policy.s6_notrack: We do not use tracking cookies, advertising or third-party analytics.
policy.s7_text: Personal data is kept for as long as there is an active business relationship or as required by legal obligations. Upon deletion request, data is removed within a maximum of 15 business days.
policy.s8_text: For privacy and data protection inquiries:
